summary: Completed comprehensive testing of cookie consent banner and language selector widgets. Both components work perfectly with proper positioning, functionality, and cross-page persistence.
passed_tests: Cookie consent banner appears in bottom-left on first visit with 1-second delay
ACCEPT button works correctly and hides banner, stores 'accepted' in localStorage
REJECT button works correctly and hides banner, stores 'rejected' in localStorage
Cookie consent does not reappear after accepting/rejecting (localStorage persistence)
Language selector visible in bottom-right with flag and 'RO' text initially
Language dropdown opens with all 5 languages: RO, English, Français, Deutsch, Italiano
Language selection updates toggle display correctly
Both widgets visible on all pages (landing, contact, pricing, terms)
No overlapping between widgets or with navbar/footer
Widgets positioned correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
Language dropdown positioned correctly without overlapping cookie consent
Google Translate integration working (script loads dynamically)
Visual design matches dark theme with proper styling
